# Teal design system

> Documentation for @kryv/teal v0.2.1 - typed React modules, semantic design tokens, and tested interaction behavior for Kryv applications.

## Start

- [Getting started](/): installation, Tailwind preset, fonts, and theming.
- [Foundations](/foundations): semantic color, typography, shape, and motion tokens.
- [Changelog](/changelog): versioned changes to @kryv/teal.

## Modules

- [Button](/modules/button) (Actions): Actions with consistent hierarchy, sizing, loading, and accessible icon treatment.
- [Field](/modules/field) (Forms): A deep form seam that connects labels, descriptions, errors, and required state.
- [Input and TextArea](/modules/input) (Forms): Native text controls with Teal sizing, invalid states, and forwarded refs.
- [Select](/modules/select) (Forms): An accessible single-value picker with keyboard navigation, typeahead, and collision-aware positioning.
- [Checkbox](/modules/checkbox) (Forms): Boolean and indeterminate selection with an integrated label and description.
- [Switch](/modules/switch) (Forms): An immediate boolean setting with explicit labeling and controlled or uncontrolled state.
- [Card](/modules/card) (Surfaces): A structural surface for related content without ambiguous interactive behavior.
- [Badge](/modules/badge) (Surfaces): A compact semantic status indicator using canonical information tones.
- [Dialog](/modules/dialog) (Overlays): A modal surface that owns focus management, naming, dismissal, and scroll locking.
- [Tooltip](/modules/tooltip) (Overlays): A short contextual hint with accessible trigger association and collision handling.
- [Menu](/modules/menu) (Overlays): A structured action menu with keyboard navigation, disabled items, icons, and danger styling.
- [Popover](/modules/popover) (Overlays): An anchored surface for arbitrary controls and supplemental content.
- [Toast](/modules/toast) (Feedback): Imperative, announced feedback with semantic tones, optional actions, and dismissal.
- [Empty State](/modules/empty-state) (Feedback): An explanatory empty result with an optional action and SVG icon.
- [Loading](/modules/loading) (Feedback): Named progress and loading treatments for local, skeleton, and full-surface states.
- [Tabs](/modules/tabs) (Navigation): Keyboard-navigable content switching through a compact item interface.
- [Pagination](/modules/pagination) (Navigation): A controlled page navigator with compact ranges and unavailable directions.
- [Page Header](/modules/page-header) (Navigation): A responsive page title, supporting text, and action area.
- [Vertical Nav](/modules/vertical-nav) (Navigation): A compound vertical navigation with icon-rail and full-text modes and a solid variant.
- [Top Bar](/modules/top-bar) (Navigation): A sticky top bar with a solid variant and brand, search, and action slots.
- [Table](/modules/table) (Data): Accessible data presentation driven by column definitions, density, loading, and empty state.
- [Separator](/modules/separator) (Data): A semantic or decorative divider for related content.

## Patterns

- [Recipes](/recipes): product compositions built from published modules.

## Optional

- [Full documentation](/llms-full.txt): every page above in a single Markdown file.
